fields.name: ssc4-1-temperature
fields.label: SSC4.1 - Temperature
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the temperature switching signal 4.1 for measurement data channel 4.

fields.name: ssc4-2-temperature
fields.label: SSC4.2 - Temperature
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the temperature switching signal 4.2 for measurement data channel 4.

fields.name: dsc-1-maintenance-warning
fields.label: DSC.1 - Maintenance Warning
fields.description: Indicates that at least one of the configured maintenance limits has been exceeded.

fields.name: mdc4-scale
fields.label: MDC4 - Scale
fields.description: Shows the multiplier for the temperature measurement value of measurement data channel 4 - 10exp(scale).

fields.name: mdc4-temperature
fields.label: MDC4 - Temperature
fields.description: Shows the current temperature measurement value of measurement data channel 4.

fields.name: ssc3-1-apeak
fields.label: SSC3.1 - aPeak
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the acceleration peak switching signal 3.1 for measurement data channel 3.

fields.name: ssc3-2-apeak
fields.label: SSC3.2 - aPeak
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the acceleration peak switching signal 3.2 for measurement data channel 3.

fields.name: mdc3-scale
fields.label: MDC3 - Scale
fields.description: Shows the multiplier for the acceleration peak measurement value of measurement data channel 3 - 10exp(scale).

fields.name: mdc3-apeak
fields.label: MDC3 - aPeak
fields.description: Shows the current acceleration peak measurement value of measurement data channel 3.

fields.name: ssc2-1-arms
fields.label: SSC2.1 - aRMS
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the acceleration rms switching signal 2.1 for measurement data channel 2.

fields.name: ssc2-2-arms
fields.label: SSC2.2 - aRMS
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the acceleration rms switching signal 2.2 for measurement data channel 2.

fields.name: mdc2-scale
fields.label: MDC2 - Scale
fields.description: Shows the multiplier for the acceleration rms measurement value of measurement data channel 2 - 10exp(scale).

fields.name: mdc2-arms
fields.label: MDC2 - aRMS
fields.description: Shows the current acceleration rms measurement value of measurement data channel 2.

fields.name: ssc1-1-vrms
fields.label: SSC1.1 - vRMS
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the velocity rms switching signal 1.1 for measurement data channel 1.

fields.name: ssc1-2-vrms
fields.label: SSC1.2 - vRMS
fields.description: Indicates the current status of the velocity rms switching signal 1.2 for measurement data channel 1.

fields.name: mdc1-scale
fields.label: MDC1 - Scale
fields.description: Shows the multiplier for the velocity rms measurement value of measurement data channel 1 - 10exp(scale).

fields.name: mdc1-vrms
fields.label: MDC1 - vRMS
fields.description: Shows the current velocity rms measurement value of measurement data channel 1.

isduVariables.name: V_CP_FunctionTag
isduVariables.description: Possibility to mark a device with function-specific information.

isduVariables.name: V_CP_LocationTag
isduVariables.description: Possibility to mark a device with location-specific information.

isduVariables.name: V_CP_ProductURI
isduVariables.description: Provides a unique instance identification compliant to DIN-SPEC 91406.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC11_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 1.1 vRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC11_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 1.1 vRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC12_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 1.2 vRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC12_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 1.2 vRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC21_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 2.1 aRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC21_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 2.1 aRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC22_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 2.2 aRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC22_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 2.2 aRMS.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC31_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 3.1 aPeak.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC31_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 3.1 aPeak.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC32_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 3.2 aPeak.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC32_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 3.2 aPeak.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC41_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 4.1 Temperature.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC41_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 4.1 Temperature.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC42_Param
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 4.2 Temperature.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC42_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 4.2 Temperature.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC11_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the vRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 1.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC12_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the vRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 1.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC21_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 2.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC22_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 2.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC31_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aPeak detection signal on the switching signal channel 3.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC32_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aPeak detection signal on the switching signal channel 3.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC41_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the temperature detection signal on the switching signal channel 4.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_SSC42_OffDelay
isduVariables.description: Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the temperature detection signal on the switching signal channel 4.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Eval_Filter
isduVariables.description: Defines the filter bandwidth for vibration signal evaluation. The filter is applied to MDC1 and MDC2 and has a 3rd order Butterworth characteristic. DIN ISO 10816/20816 requires 10 .. 1000 Hz.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_IO_CQOutFunc
isduVariables.description: Defines the function of the output signal at C/Q (pin 4) in SIO mode.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_IO_IQOutFunc
isduVariables.description: Defines the function of the output signal at I/Q (pin 2).

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_IO_AOParamVrms
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint value for the maximum value at the analog output.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_IO_AOParamArms
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint value for the maximum value at the analog output.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_IO_AOParamApeak
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint value for the maximum value at the analog output.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_IO_AOParamTemp
isduVariables.description: Defines the setpoint values for the minimum and maximum value at the analog output.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_Event_Config
isduVariables.description: Defines which event sources can trigger events.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_Device_Char
isduVariables.description: Shows relevant key characteristics of the device for use in applications.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_MDC1_Descriptor
isduVariables.description: Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 1 (process data MV).

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_MDC2_Descriptor
isduVariables.description: Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 2 (process data MV).

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_MDC3_Descriptor
isduVariables.description: Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 3 (process data MV).

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_MDC4_Descriptor
isduVariables.description: Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 4 (process data MV).

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_ConfigVrms
isduVariables.description: Provides settings for configuration of vRMS maintenance monitoring.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_ConfigArms
isduVariables.description: Provides settings for configuration of aRMS maintenance monitoring.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_ConfigApeak
isduVariables.description: Provides settings for configuration of aPeak maintenance monitoring.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_ConfigTemp
isduVariables.description: Provides settings for configuration of temperature maintenance monitoring.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_ConfigOper
isduVariables.description: Defines the limit for the accumulated operating time for a planned maintenance cycle in hours. The according maintenance alarm will be set, if this limit is exceeded.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_MonVrms
isduVariables.description: Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the vRMS measurement channel.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_MonArms
isduVariables.description: Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the aRMS measurement channel.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_MonApeak
isduVariables.description: Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the aPeak measurement channel.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_MonTemp
isduVariables.description: Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the temperature measurement channel.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_MonOperTime
isduVariables.description: Shows the time in hours in powered operation since the last maintenance reset.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFV_Maintenance_Status
isduVariables.description: Shows the diagnosis status of the different maintenance evaluation channels.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_OPM_OperHour
isduVariables.description: Shows the overall hours of operation since initial commissioning.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_OPM_TempInd
isduVariables.description: Indicates the operation at ambient temperatures close to or in excess of specification limits.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_OPM_TempMon
isduVariables.description: Contains parameters showing current and past conditions of temperature exposure since initial commissioning.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_OPM_PowerMon
isduVariables.description: Contains parameters showing current and past conditions of power cycles since initial commissioning.

isduVariables.name: V_XPFS_ObserveData
isduVariables.description: Provides a set of relevant data suitable for observation purposes.
